title: San Martín: El cruce de Los Andes
original_title: Revolución: el cruce de los Andes
overview: Buenos Aires, 1880. A journalist interviews Manuel Esteban Corvalán, one of the last living men who crossed the Andes in 1817 with José de San Martín, during the Argentinian and Chilean wars of independence, as one of his secretaries, when he was only 15 years old.

trailers.title: Revolución, el cruce de los Andes. 7 de abril en cines. Trailer.
